AUTOMATON-ENCODE.title: Encode
AUTOMATON-ENCODE.description:
Encode a card.
When [blue]3[/blue] cards are Encoded, their effects (above the Encode keyword) are merged into a Function that costs [blue]1[/blue].
AUTOMATON-STASH.title: Stash
AUTOMATON-STASH.description: Place a card inside of your Bronze Orb, up to a maximum of [blue]5[/blue]. You draw the oldest card from it at the start of each turn.
